prayer.title: 🕙️ Morning Prayer
prayer.modeh_ani: מודה אני לפניך — I gratefully thank You, living and eternal King, for returning my soul within me with compassion.
prayer.blessing: Blessed are You who guides the steps of man — direct my path today.
prayer.psalm: **Psalm 16:8**: "I have set the Lord always before me; He is at my right hand, I will not be shaken."
prayer.proverb: **Proverbs 21:5**: "The plans of the diligent lead surely to abundance."
prayer.intention: Open doors that no one can shut, and close doors that would lead me astray.
prayer.closing: The Lord goes before you today. He will be with you; He will never leave you nor forsake you. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged.
